understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete the KA59 puzzle game by solving each level: place every selectable piece onto goal tiles marked '+' so that all goals are occupied simultaneously to trigger WIN, then proceed until the final level is won.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn controls the currently selected piece shown by player.id/player.position (and 'P' in the semantic grid). MOVE actions attempt to shift that piece by one cell (3 pixels) in the chosen direction, with x increasing to the right and y increasing downward. Walls ('#') can block movement, but the movement.*_blocked flags are only hints and don’t guarantee failure. Pushable blocks ('B') can be pushed when adjacent in the move direction, causing the block to shift along with the selected piece if space/constraints allow. Levels may contain multiple selectables ('S'), and control is switched using CLICK on the exact pixel/grid coordinate of another selectable’s position.
